summary: Completed testing of Universal Search Bar feature. All 18 backend API tests passed. All frontend tests passed including search bar visibility, Holiday/Document/Wiki type badges, result navigation, clear button, and click-outside-close behavior.

issues: Console warning: HTML hydration error - '<tr> cannot be a child of <span>' due to React DevTools wrapper injection. Not user-visible, cosmetic console warning only.

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/search?q=core returns wiki results (Core Values page)
Backend: GET /api/search?q=diwali returns holiday result (Diwali/Deepavali)
Backend: GET /api/search?q=rubric returns 5 document results
Backend: GET /api/search?q=prompting returns Psychology of Prompting document
Backend: GET /api/search?q=process returns Revised Process Flow document
Backend: GET /api/search?q=a returns empty (min 2 chars enforced)
Backend: GET /api/search?q= returns empty
Backend: Search requires authentication (401 without token)
Backend: Search results capped at 20
Backend: Case-insensitive search works (DIWALI, DiWaLi)
Backend: Search result structure contains type, title, subtitle, snippet, route
Backend: Holiday results have correct route (/hr/holiday-calendar)
Backend: Document results have correct route (/training/deep-learning/...)
Backend: Wiki results have correct route (/wiki/page/...)
Frontend: Search bar visible on Dashboard with placeholder 'Search wiki, documents, holidays, grievances...'
Frontend: Typing 'diwali' shows dropdown with Holiday badge
Frontend: Clicking Diwali result navigates to /hr/holiday-calendar
Frontend: Typing 'rubric' shows 5 Document results with Document badges
Frontend: Typing 'core' shows Wiki results with Wiki badge and snippets
Frontend: Clicking Wiki result navigates to /wiki/page/core-values
Frontend: Clear button (X) clears search and closes dropdown
Frontend: Clicking outside dropdown closes it
Frontend: Single character 'a' does not trigger dropdown/results
Frontend: Debounce working (300ms delay before API call)
critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard.js: Search component well-implemented with debounce (300ms), AnimatePresence for dropdown animation, proper data-testid attributes
server.py /api/search: Searches 4 data sources (wiki, documents, holidays, grievances) with case-insensitive matching
Search results properly capped at 20 and minimum 2 characters enforced
seed_data_creation: None - using existing wiki pages, DOCUMENT_TITLES dict, and HOLIDAYS list from server.py
context_for_next_testing_agent: Universal Search Bar feature fully working. data-testid attributes: dashboard-search-input, search-clear-button, search-results-dropdown, search-result-{index}. Backend /api/search endpoint searches wiki pages (MongoDB), documents (DOCUMENT_TITLES dict), holidays (HOLIDAYS list), and user grievances. Results include type badges (Wiki/Document/Holiday/Grievance) with color coding. Min query length 2 chars, max 20 results.
